module_info.docstring: PRD and README freshness tests — verify docs stay in sync with reality.

functions.name: test_prd_version_matches_plugin_json
functions.docstring: PRD version header must match plugin.json version.

functions.name: _extract_table_count
functions.docstring: Extract count from markdown table row like | **Label** | 27 | ...

functions.name: _extract_section_count
functions.docstring: Extract count from section header like ### Label (27).

functions.name: _extract_intro_counts
functions.docstring: Extract counts from README intro line like 'With 27 skills, 5 agents, 36 commands'.

functions.name: test_prd_component_counts
functions.docstring: Section 4.1 component counts must match filesystem.

functions.name: test_readme_component_counts
functions.docstring: README intro line and section headers must match filesystem.
